assertions.assertion: The GenerateAsync method receives a NameIdGenerationContext with Subject claims
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows GenerateAsync(NameIdGenerationContext context, CancellationToken ct) with context.Subject.

assertions.assertion: Extracts the employee_id claim from context.Subject
Returns NameIdGenerationResult.Success with a NameId containing the employee_id value
Handles the missing claim case with NameIdGenerationResult.Failure
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows: NameIdGenerationResult.Failure(StatusCodes.Responder, StatusCodes.UnknownPrincipal, 'Employee ID claim not found.').
